ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.
Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.
AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine.
La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes
Place one nicotine pouch under your
upper lip and leave for up to 1 hour.
This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.
Ce produit peut ne pas vous convenir. Toujours lire l'étiquette et suivre le mode d'emploi.

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows a person outdoors holding a green container, with instructional text explaining how to use a nicotine pouch. Regulatory warnings and age restriction icons are clearly visible. No ZONNIC logo or halo elements are present in the marketing asset.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows a person outdoors holding a green container, with instructional text explaining how to use a nicotine pouch. Regulatory warnings and age restriction icons are clearly visible. No ZONNIC logo or halo elements are present in the marketing asset.
CONTENT TYPE: educational

── LOGO ──
  Present: NO

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: NO
  ⚠ NO HALO DETECTED ON ANY LETTER — LOGO-DONT-01 VIOLATION

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: light_image
  Colours: light blue, grey, green, white
  Description: Outdoor scene with a person in a grey hoodie and yellow hat, holding a green container. Blurry cityscape and sky in the background.

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top of image
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: PRESENT
    Position: bottom left
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom of image

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: Bold sans-serif (regulatory and instructional text)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: How to use: Place one nicotine pouch under your upper lip and leave for up to 1 hour.

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: grey, light blue, green, white
  Flavour palette match: Grey/Neutral
  Secondary colour usage: Green is used as an accent (container held by person)

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: This educational image features a person outdoors holding a green container, with clear instructional text explaining how to use a nicotine pouch. The background is a light, neutral outdoor scene with grey and blue tones, and green is used as an accent colour. Regulatory elements are fully present: the bilingual nicotine warning is at the top, the 18+ age icon is at the bottom left, and the risk communication text is at the bottom. The font used throughout is a bold sans-serif, matching the Santral brand typeface. No ZONNIC logo or halo is visible, which is acceptable for educational content according to brand guidelines. All colours and layout elements are appropriate for this content type, and no violations are present. This image fully complies with all brand guidelines for educational assets.
